headline: Prime Video Expands 'House of David' Universe with Epic Moses Companion Series
lede: Amazon's biblical epic franchise is set to dramatically expand with a high-profile companion series starring Sir Ben Kingsley as the legendary prophet Moses.
body:
Prime Video is doubling down on its biblical storytelling strategy with a bold new companion series to its flagship historical drama "House of David". The network announced "The Old Stories: Moses", a three-part special featuring Sir Ben Kingsley in the titular role, set to premiere on May 14.

The companion series represents an ambitious expansion of the "House of David" narrative universe, leveraging Kingsley's considerable dramatic gravitas to explore one of scripture's most complex historical figures. Kingsley, a veteran of nuanced historical portrayals, brings substantial dramatic weight to the role of the Hebrew prophet who led his people from Egyptian bondage.

Production details suggest the series will employ a documentary-style narrative approach, blending historical analysis with dramatic reconstruction. Sources close to the production indicate the series will utilize cutting-edge visual effects and scholarly historical consultation to create an immersive exploration of Moses's life and biblical significance.

The companion series signals Prime Video's continued investment in prestige historical programming, following the critical and commercial success of "House of David". By expanding the franchise with focused character studies, the streaming platform appears to be creating a more comprehensive storytelling ecosystem around its biblical content.
key_facts: Companion to Prime Video's 'House of David'
